brand_identity.name: Mithila Sutra
brand_identity.target_audience: Nepali diaspora, cultural enthusiasts, premium organic buyers
brand_identity.design_philosophy: Fusion of traditional Mithila aesthetics with modern minimalist luxury. Think 'Aesop meets Madhubani'.

typography.instructions: Use 'Rozha One' for all major headings to evoke the thick-stroke style of Devanagari calligraphy. Use 'Outfit' for UI elements and body text for high readability.

primary.description: Mithila Maroon / Deep Saffron - Represents energy and auspiciousness

secondary.description: Turmeric Gold / Ochre - Represents purity and earth

background.description: Rice Paper / Off-White - A warm, organic base instead of sterile white

accent.description: Forest Green - For nature-based products (herbs, oils)

layout.grid_system: Use a 12-column grid. For product listings, use a 'Masonry' or 'Bento' style layout to break monotony.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.product: group relative bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/30 transition-all duration-500 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-primary/5
cards.feature: bg-background-alt p-8 rounded-2xl border border-border hover:border-secondary transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-white border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-lg h-12 px-4 transition-all

navigation.style: Floating glassmorphism header or classic centered logo with split menu.
navigation.classes: backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80 border-b border-border/50 sticky top-0 z-50

textures.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with thin stroke weights (1.5px) to maintain elegance.

motion.hover_effects: Scale up slightly (1.02) and deepen shadow on hover. Use 'transition-all duration-300 ease-out'.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on the 'Rice Paper' background has a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1. Use #1A1A1A for body text.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings in Primary color (#8B0000) for keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/rozha-one' and '@fontsource/outfit' to the project.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the colors and font families defined above.
3. GLOBAL STYLES: Apply the 'grain' texture to the body background in 'index.css' to give the site a tactile, premium feel.
4. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: Customize Shadcn components to remove the default 'slate' look. Use the warm 'border' color (#E5E0D8) and 'primary' (#8B0000) for active states.
5. MITHILA TOUCH: Use the 'mithila_style' border class on featured product cards or section headers to add cultural context without overwhelming the design.
6. IMAGERY: Use the provided image URLs for placeholders. Ensure all images have 'object-cover' and are wrapped in overflow-hidden containers.
7. DO NOT use generic 'lorem ipsum'. Use culturally relevant placeholder text (e.g., 'Handcrafted in Janakpur', 'Pure organic ghee from the Himalayas').
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic gradients or default shadows.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for headers and overlays.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures and noise overlays separate good from extraordinary.
